title: Update footer attribution to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S' (italicized name)

requirements.summary: Change Footer attribution text from 'Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai' to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S' with 'Athira S' rendered in italic style, preserving all other Footer content and styling
acceptanceCriteria: Footer displays 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S' where 'Athira S' is wrapped in an <em> or italic tag
No other text, layout, colors, or components in the footer are changed
The rest of the page (Navigation, Hero, About, Vision Pillars, Reunion, Survey, Stakeholder Voices, Digital Impact sections) is unchanged

file_operations.description: Update the attribution text in the Footer component from 'Built with ❤️ using caffeine.ai' to 'Built with ❤️ by Athira S', wrapping 'Athira S' in an <em> tag or using italic styling (font-style: italic). Ensure all other Footer content, layout, social media links, newsletter subscription form, CTA banner, action buttons, and contact details remain exactly as they are in the current version. Do not modify any other sections, styling, or component structure.
